LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE LADVA LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF LIZETTE GALEANO IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS CAFE ALGIERS AND HAMMOU BENHARCHACHE, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS HAJ DOE 1 MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTEROGGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY. THE MATTERS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED AS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2033.280(B). PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSES WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,650 ARE GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: ARLENE BARTON; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Off Calendar May-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SUMY KIM OF THE LAW FIRM OF PERETZ & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 732-3777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CAFE ALGIERS AND HAMMOU BENHARCHACHE, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS HAJ DOE 1 Motion To Compel Responses To Interoggatories is granted. No Opposition was filed. Plaintiffs failed to respond to discovery. The matters are deemed admitted as to the requests for admissions pursuant to C.C.P. 2033.280(b). Plaintiff shall provide responses within 30 days of the signed Order. Sanctions in the amount of $1,650 are granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Arlene Barton; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
